message:
feat(tick-strategy): implement predictive screen tick system with persistence

Implements the core tick strategy infrastructure (bd-1nl75 epic):
- TransitionCounter: f64 frequency matrix with Laplace smoothing, decay, merge
- MarkovPredictor: confidence-weighted blending for screen transition prediction
- TickAllocation: probability-to-divisor mapping (Linear/Exponential/Stepped curves)
- Predictive strategy: Markov-chain-driven tick allocation with cached divisors
- Persistence: atomic JSON save/load for TransitionCounter with version checking

Fixes pre-existing clippy issues in program.rs (collapsible-if, unnecessary-unwrap)
and adds Cmd::SetTickStrategy handling in wasm_runner.rs/simulator.rs.

98 tick_strategy tests, all passing. Closes bd-1nl75.3.5, bd-1nl75.5.1.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
